untranslatable_reason: Dark Cloud Cover is a visual candlestick pattern requiring multi-candle shape recognition (bearish engulfing across two candles at triangle top). This cannot be expressed with the allowed indicators and operators. The pattern detection itself (second candle opening above first candle's close and closing below its midpoint) requires bar comparison logic not supported by the current operator set. Triangle identification also requires pattern recognition beyond available indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture the essence of the breakout confirmation using price action (close below previous close) and high volume. However, the specific Dark Cloud Cover pattern—where a second candle opens above the prior candle's close and closes below its midpoint—cannot be fully encoded with available indicators. A two-day confirmation delay and triangle pattern detection would require custom pattern recognition logic. Exit condition uses reasonable reversal logic (close above prior high) as author specified 'AUTHOR_SILENT'.
